description: 4. Check if a URL is in MISP events
name: url

outputs.description: Bad URLs found. URL.Malicious.Vendor For malicious URLs, the vendor that made the decision.
outputs.name: URL.Data

outputs.description: For malicious URLs, the reason that the vendor made the decision. DBotScore.Indicator The indicator that was tested.
outputs.name: URL.Malicious.Description

outputs.description: Indicator type. DBotScore.Vendor The vendor used to calculate the score.
outputs.name: DBotScore.Type
